name: wugong_email_skill
description: A tool to manage email accounts, sync emails, and read/send messages using Wugong Email CLI.

execution_policy.oauth2_flow: Interactive mode required. Notify user to authorize via the provided URL in browser.

decision_flow.step1: Check if ~/.config/wugong/config.toml exists. If not, install via install.sh and ask user for encryption/account config.
decision_flow.step2: Check account existence via 'wugong account list --non-interactive -p <password> --json'.
decision_flow.step3: Execute target command with --non-interactive, --json, and -p flags.
